title: Knotwood
hook: Drag carved wooden blocks onto an 8x8 board, fill a full row or column to clear it, and build combo multipliers — no timer, just space.
mechanic: block-fit / line-clear puzzle (Block Blast / Woodoku family): drag wooden polyomino pieces (1-5 cells) from a 3-slot tray onto an 8x8 grid; completing any full row OR column clears it; no gravity and no timer, the only pressure is running out of room; twist = a rising COMBO multiplier for back-to-back clears + a daily-seed challenge + unlockable wood grains by best score; game over when no tray piece fits anywhere

provenance.method: fixed gap-hunt (content-search + dedupe_check, both clear) after the 2026-06-15 false-negative review
provenance.gap: block-fit / line-clear was absent across all 187 prior games (confirmed via rg over Games/*/genesis.json+DESIGN.md AND dedupe_check exit 0)
sources: Play Store radar 2026-06-14: Block Blast! ~500M installs (heat 0.97), Woodoku Blast, Color Block: Combo Blast in TOP_FREE puzzle
evergreen casual puzzle mechanic, mobile-portrait native, vanilla-canvas trivial

retention_seeds: persisted wood-grain unlocks by best score
notes: First build after the dedup tooling/memory fixes (feedback_verify_game_exists_by_content). A/B stack alternation: previous new game gulp_rush/187 was phaser, so this is vanilla.
